data.title: Heitman raises $2.6 billion for Value-Add Investment Series, surpassing $2 billion target with $620 million co-investment.
data.description: The global real estate investment management firm Heitman LLC disclosed the successful close of Heitman Value Partners Fund VI (“HVP VI” or “the fund”) based in Chicago. This fund secured commitments amounting to $2 billion, surpassing its initial $1.75 billion objective and hitting the fund’s hard cap. This stands out as Heitman's most significant closed-end fundraising effort yet. Moreover, investors pledged an extra $620 million of co-investment capital to the fund.

data.title: Emily Strain promoted to lead Workplace Interiors at Corgan, succeeding Lindsay Wilson, to focus on as President.
data.description: A well-known architecture and design firm in Dallas, Corgan, has recently announced the promotion of Emily Strain as the new Workplace Interiors Sector Leader. Strain will be responsible for guiding the sector's strategic development and expansion, leveraging her proven track record of creativity and management within the company. She takes over from Lindsay Wilson, who will now concentrate solely on her duties as the President, stepping down from her previous dual position as Workplace Interiors Sector Leader and firm President. This move signifies a shift in leadership within the firm, with Strain poised to lead the sector's growth initiatives.

data.title: Latin Metals completes 27 km of IP surveying at Cerro Bayo Gold-Silver Project in Argentina with option partner Daura Gold.
data.description: Latin Metals has successfully finished an IP survey spanning 27 kilometers at the Cerro Bayo Gold-Silver Project in partnership with Daura Gold.

data.title: Corporación América Airports announces receipt of $91,205,056 payment from Peru for ICSID Arbitration Award.
data.description: Corporación América Airports S.A. (NYSE: CAAP), a top private airport operator, shared that its affiliate Sociedad Aeroportuaria Kuntur Wasi S.A. ("Kuntur Wasi"), where CAAP has a 50% indirect stake, recently got a payment of US$91,205,056 from the Republic of Peru. This amount was received following the final verdict given by the International Centre for Settlement of Investment Disputes ("ICSID" or "CIADI" in Spanish).

data.title: Thompson and PCA NC partner to empower Charlotte families with mental health & practical support in Mecklenburg and Gaston counties, benefiting families in the Charlotte region - promoting resilience and unity.
data.description: Thompson, the oldest social services organization in North Carolina, has partnered with Positive Childhood Alliance North Carolina (PCANC) to enhance prevention-focused mental health services for families in Mecklenburg and Gaston counties. This collaboration aims to provide practical support to families in the greater Charlotte region. The goal is to ensure that more families have access to necessary resources to remain strong and resilient. This partnership comes at a crucial time as it seeks to support families in need.

data.title: Hasbro reveals new board members, enhancing its team.
data.description: A recent study reported that the global population is estimated to reach 8 billion by 2025, with a current count of 7.8 billion inhabitants. The research also found that over 800 million people around the world are currently suffering from hunger, while 1.3 billion tons of food gets wasted annually. The study suggests that global food production needs to increase by 60% to meet the demands of the growing population. Furthermore, it was noted that around 2 billion people, or 26% of the total population, are experiencing moderate to severe food insecurity. This situation is even more critical due to the ongoing effects of natural disasters and the COVID-19 pandemic, which have exacerbated food shortages in many regions. The study underscores the urgent need for worldwide efforts to address food insecurity and promote sustainable food production in order to ensure food security for all.

data.title: Pennsylvania American Water urges customers in 21 counties to cut nonessential water use due to drought watch.
data.description: Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania - On January 20, 2026, Pennsylvania American Water urged customers in various parts of its service area to voluntarily lower water usage due to the extension of the drought watch declaration. The company emphasized the importance of conservation efforts as a response to the heightened drought conditions.

data.title: Leon Software and SkyAccess integrate to automate empty leg listings for charter operators in Europe, benefitting both companies.
data.description: An official integration has been announced between SkyAccess, a real-time empty leg flight marketplace based in Los Angeles, and Leon Software, a cloud-based aviation management software platform from Warsaw, Poland. This collaboration allows charter operators using Leon Software to seamlessly list their available empty leg and repositioning flights on the SkyAccess platform. This integration aims to cater to the increasing demand for private jet travel by automatically aggregating these flights from certified operators, benefiting both businesses and customers.

data.title: AI integration accelerates enterprise cloud adoption in Brazil, ISG reports; Brazilian companies increasingly rely on cloud platforms for operations.
data.description: Business in São Paulo is seeing a significant increase in the utilization of cloud platforms as generative AI becomes more integrated into their operations, according to ISG. This trend is rapidly growing among Brazilian enterprises, with an emphasis on harnessing the power of artificial intelligence.

data.title: VolitionRx appoints two new lab providers for Nu.Q® Vet Cancer test, expanding access in the US and Asia.
data.description: In Henderson, Nevada on January 20, 2026, VolitionRx Limited (NYSE American: VNRX), a multinational epigenetics company, disclosed the selection of two additional centralized lab providers for its Nu.Q® Vet Cancer test in the United States and Asia. This move is set to enhance accessibility to the test for a broader population.
